items.name: qclaw-wechat-client
items.description: Reverse-engineered TypeScript client for QClaw's WeChat Access API.

items.name: openclaw-knowledge-distiller
items.description: Open CLAW Knowledge Distiller · 龍蝦知識蒸餾器 — Turn YouTube/Bilibili videos into structured knowledge articles. Local Qwen3-ASR MLX + AI summarization. MCP server for Claude Code / Open CLAW agents.

items.name: specc.sh
items.description: Spec Coding beats Vibe Coding. A full-stack AI template for production-grade code.

items.name: MathLens
items.description: MathLens 是一个专注于数学题目视频讲解的 Agent Skill。你只需粘贴一道数学题（图片或文字），它就能自动完成从题目分析、可视化讲解、配音脚本到 Manim 动画视频的全流程制作。

items.name: zhtw-mcp
items.description: A linguistic linter for Traditional Chinese (zh-TW)

items.name: env-runner
items.description: Generic environment runner for JavaScript runtime.

items.name: wechat-openclaw-plugin
items.description: 这是一个面向 OpenClaw 的微信通路插件，提供两条接入能力：一条是   基于扫码登录和 AGP WebSocket 的双向消息通道，另一条是面向微信服   务号/企业微信风格回调的 HTTP webhook 通道。项目核心目标是把外部   微信消息接入 OpenClaw Agent 体系，复用现有会话、路由、流式输出   和工具调用能力。

items.name: ua-parser-es
items.description: JavaScript library to detect Browser and OS info from User-Agent data, rewritten in ESM and TS

items.name: Hallucinet-Explorer
items.description: A web browser where every page is hallucinated by an LLM. No real HTTP requests. Browse the World Vibe Web.

items.name: startup-claude-skills
items.description: Reusable Claude Code skills for launching and running a tech startup. Drop into any project's .claude/skills/ directory.

items.name: where-am-i
items.description: Give your OpenClaw GPS awareness. Lightweight OwnTracks receiver — zero dependencies, named places, location history. Your agent finally knows where you are.

items.name: FEbypass
items.description: Level 8 Executor And Needs ClientReplicator Support… not work for you delta skids

items.name: wall-climbing-quadruped
items.description: A wall-climbing quadruped robot with active suction feet for free-form surface adhesion. Powered by DJI C-Board (STM32F407) & 12x HTD-85H bus servos. Developed at HUST.

items.name: nemoclaw
items.description: On-chain agentic management for Solana, powered by x402

items.name: monkeytype-desktop
items.description: Offline-first Tauri desktop version of Monkeytype for macOS – local storage, custom themes, no server dependencies

items.name: erlkoenig
items.description: A container runtime for static binaries. 68 KB C runtime + Erlang/OTP control plane. 67ms   startup, 30 MB RAM. Linux namespaces, cgroups v2, seccomp-BPF, nf_tables firewall (pure   Erlang, no C). Elixir DSL for declarative config. No Docker, no Kubernetes, no YAML — just   a binary and a config.

items.name: tui-music-player
items.description: local music player running in terminal

items.name: modu
items.description: Modu simplifies Git Worktree management for multiple projects, enabling efficient workflow across separate repositories.
